name: LIXTE BIOTECHNOLOGY HOLDINGS, INC.
business: The company is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical and proton cancer therapy company focused on identifying new targets for cancer drug development and developing and commercializing cancer therapies. It is focusing on the clinical development of a specific protein phosphatase inhibitor, LB-100, and is the majority shareholder of Liora Technologies Europe Ltd., which develops the LiGHT proton therapy system.

exposures.sentence: The Company is focusing on the clinical development of a specific protein phosphatase inhibitor, referred to as LB-100, which has been shown to have clinical anti-cancer activity.

Liora's proprietary technology, known as LiGHT System (Linac for Image Guided Hadron Therapy), has significant advantages over currently available technologies for treating tumors with proton therapy.

catalysts.event: Data on toxicity and preliminary efficacy from Phase 1b of GEIS soft tissue sarcoma trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to have data on toxicity and preliminary efficacy from this portion of the clinical trial during the quarter ending March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of MD Anderson OCCC clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect that this clinical trial will be completed by December 31, 2028.

catalysts.event: Recommissioning and updates of LiGHT machine estimated to take twenty-four months
catalysts.sentence: The timeline to make the LiGHT machine operational is estimated to take twenty-four months and cost approximately two million dollars.
